Acid Conversion.name: Acid Conversion
Acid Conversion.description:
A portion of the damage dealt by strikes with this weapon is converted to Acid damage. The proportion converted depends on the Tier of this prefix.

  • Tier 1: 33% of damage converted

  • Tier 2: 66% of damage converted

  • Tier 3: 100% of damage converted

Playtest Notes

The infrastructure for splitting a single attack into multiple typed damage components does not yet exist. Until it does, all tiers of this affix convert 100% of the weapon's damage to Acid. Once multi-type damage is supported, lower tiers will convert only a fraction of the total damage, leaving the remainder as the weapon's original type.

Acid Damage.name: Acid Damage
Acid Damage.description:
Add Acid damage to strikes made with this weapon. The bonus damage is equal to 2 for each Tier of this suffix.

Playtest Notes

This bonus currently applies as flat additional damage of the weapon's existing damage type. In a future update, this will deal damage as Acid, checked against the target's Acid resistance separately.

Acid Resistance.name: Acid Resistance
Acid Resistance.description: Increase Acid resistance by 3 for each Tier of this prefix.

Activating.name: Activating
Activating.description: Grants the Replenish Action action, allowing the bearer to restore Action in moments of duress. The amount restored scales with the Tier of this prefix.

Arcana.name: Arcana
Arcana.description: Increase the Enchantment Bonus for Arcana skill checks by 1 for each Tier of this prefix.

Arrow Spellcraft.name: Arrow Spellcraft
Arrow Spellcraft.description: This item is imbued with the essence of Arrow spellcraft. While equipped, the bearer instinctively gains knowledge of the Arrow gesture, allowing them to compose spells using it even without having learned the gesture through a talent.
